name: did-host-didcomm
description: DID-hosting node whose DID advertises a DIDComm endpoint (DIDCommMessaging via a shared mediator) only — no HTTP resolution endpoint. Use this for a witness, watcher, or any service whose role is consumed via DIDComm rather than an inbound URL. The DID document carries a single DIDCommMessaging service pointing at the mediator. URL or WEBVH_SERVER is still required at provision time so the VTA knows where to publish the did:webvh log itself, but neither appears in the rendered document. Nodes that advertise an HTTP endpoint should use 'did-host-http'; nodes that need both should use 'did-host-http-didcomm'.
